channel.title: Computer Theory on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Theory on yexca'Blog

item.title: Formal Languages and Automata - Basic Concepts
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Introduction Sometimes it’s the people who no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine Recently, I learned from the comments on Bitecho’s video about the documentary about Turing, The Imitation Game. I watched it and was deeply moved by this quote from the film, using it as an epigraph for this article on Formal Languages and Automata.
